app_ref: publify/publify_core v10.0.3 (80ede867). NOTE: the third app is the publify_core ENGINE, not the publify deploy app — the deploy app is a thin shell whose only app controller is application_controller.rb; the domain (31 controllers) lives in publify_core. Pinning the engine keeps a self-contained SQLite/RSpec unit. See PROJECT_TRACKER decision log 2026-07-07 and README.md.
procedure: eval/tier2/draw_anchors.rb (deterministic; see eval/tier2-expansion/PREREGISTRATION.md "Anchor selection"). Feature-weighted mix: --features 2 (2 feature / 1 bug / 1 behavior).
route_table_method: bin/rails routes --expanded run from spec/dummy (the engine's non-isolated routes draw into the dummy host app; BUNDLE_GEMFILE points at the engine Gemfile) via eval/tier2-expansion/build_routes_from_rails.rb. 144 routes, 118 unique app pairs, classifier 98/118 resolved (83.1%), 0 compile crashes. ctxpack app_root = engine root + a stub config/application.rb (discovery marker only; never booted).

packet_test_candidate.note: Recorded post-draw for provenance only; NOT consulted by the draw (draw_anchors.rb is packet-content-blind). Feeds the pre-registered test-pointer sub-analysis. Publify is 4/4 (every drawn controller has a spec/controllers/<controller>_controller_spec.rb), like Campfire; the within-app contrast for the sub-analysis comes from Lobsters' 2/2.

skips.reason: controller already assigned to another slot
controller already assigned to another slot
